name: Doggo: buyer requests a callback to discuss a litter

messages.content: Can someone call me back to chat about an upcoming border collie litter? Happy with anytime after 5pm weekdays.

commercial_intent.reason: buyer asking for a callback about a specific breed/litter

notes: Callback framed as a buyer-side quote enquiry (intent=request_quote) — matches buyer_pricing_or_availability before direct_human_request_cx because the latter requires direct_human_request=true (explicit 'speak to a human').
